overall.description: A first-person exploration through a gothic castle corridor with vaulted ceilings and stained glass windows, entering two different dormitory rooms marked '1 YEAR' and '2 YEARS'. The environment features stone architecture, four-poster beds with green curtains, and ornate wooden furniture. High-quality game engine rendering with atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow gothic corridor with high vaulted ceilings and teal stained glass windows. The stone walls are lined with ornate metal railings and lit by warm wall sconces. The camera approaches a dark wooden door marked with a '1 YEAR' brass plaque.

segments.scene_description: Inside the first dormitory room, the camera explores a circular chamber with stone walls and gothic arches. The room contains multiple four-poster beds with green curtains, a central iron stove, wooden wardrobes, and forest-themed tapestries. Warm lamplight illuminates the space as the camera turns to survey the furnishings.

events.description: exits the first dormitory back into the gothic corridor

The room features four-poster beds with green curtains, an iron stove, forest tapestries, and a side table with a bowl of fruit. The camera moves between the beds surveying the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a gothic corridor as it enters and exits two distinct student dormitories. It begins by gliding through a narrow stone hallway under high vaulted ceilings and teal stained glass windows, moving toward a dark wooden door marked with a 1 YEAR brass plaque. As the camera enters the first circular chamber, the scene shifts to a warm, lamplit interior filled with green-curtained four-poster beds, forest tapestries, and a central iron stove before retreating back into the corridor. The movement continues past the vaulted arches to a second door marked 2 YEARS, opening into a mirrored dormitory layout featuring similar gothic furnishings and a side table with a bowl of fruit. Finally, the camera exits the second room and returns to the stone corridor, passing the stained glass windows once more as the journey concludes.
